# Yambr Documentation
> docs.yambr.com — complete documentation for the Yambr Open Computer Use platform

## What is Yambr?
Yambr is an open-source computer use API that gives AI agents an isolated workspace
with browser automation (Playwright), terminal access, file system, and sub-agent
orchestration — all via MCP (Model Context Protocol).

## Key documentation sections

### Getting started
- Quickstart: https://docs.yambr.com/quickstart
- Architecture overview: https://docs.yambr.com/architecture
- Introduction: https://docs.yambr.com/introduction

### Demo course (eight live scenarios on chat.yambr.com)
- Course overview: https://docs.yambr.com/demo-course/overview
- 1. Investor pitch deck (pptx skill): https://docs.yambr.com/demo-course/01-presentation
- 2. Project proposal in Word (docx skill): https://docs.yambr.com/demo-course/02-document
- 3. Marketing budget tracker in Excel (xlsx skill): https://docs.yambr.com/demo-course/03-spreadsheet
- 4. Freelance invoice PDF (pdf skill): https://docs.yambr.com/demo-course/04-pdf
- 5. Data → chart with Python: https://docs.yambr.com/demo-course/05-data-chart
- 6. Roasthaus landing page (frontend-design skill): https://docs.yambr.com/demo-course/06-frontend
- 7. Hacker News AI digest (playwright-cli skill): https://docs.yambr.com/demo-course/07-browser
- 8. Building the invoice-builder skill (skill-creator): https://docs.yambr.com/demo-course/08-skill-creator
- 9. What's next — n8n teaser: https://docs.yambr.com/demo-course/09-whats-next

### Platform (cloud)
- Platform overview: https://docs.yambr.com/platform/overview
- Getting API keys: https://docs.yambr.com/platform/api-keys
- Hosted chat interface: https://docs.yambr.com/platform/hosted-chat
- Computer Use endpoint: https://docs.yambr.com/platform/cu-endpoint

### Self-hosting
- Requirements: https://docs.yambr.com/install/requirements
- Docker quickstart: https://docs.yambr.com/install/quickstart
- Configuration: https://docs.yambr.com/install/configuration
- Model settings: https://docs.yambr.com/install/model-settings

### Features
- Browser automation: https://docs.yambr.com/features/browser
- Terminal access: https://docs.yambr.com/features/terminal
- Code execution: https://docs.yambr.com/features/code-execution
- Sub-agents: https://docs.yambr.com/features/sub-agents
- File preview: https://docs.yambr.com/features/file-preview

### Skills
- Skills overview: https://docs.yambr.com/skills/overview
- Creating custom skills: https://docs.yambr.com/skills/creating
- Skills reference: https://docs.yambr.com/skills/reference

### Integrations
- Open WebUI: https://docs.yambr.com/integrations/open-webui
- Claude Desktop: https://docs.yambr.com/integrations/claude-desktop
- LiteLLM: https://docs.yambr.com/integrations/litellm
- n8n: https://docs.yambr.com/integrations/n8n

### API Reference
- MCP API introduction: https://docs.yambr.com/api-reference/introduction
- MCP endpoint: https://api.yambr.com/mcp/computer_use

## Links
- Website: https://yambr.com
- App / API keys: https://app.yambr.com
- Chat interface: https://chat.yambr.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Yambr/open-computer-use
- Telegram: https://t.me/yambrcom
